evaluator_output.reason: Good selection of noise-cancelling headphones within the $100 to $250 range — results look solid.

final_response:
For a perfect blend of comfort, sound quality, and outstanding noise cancellation, the Sony WH-CH720N takes the crown at just $149. These feather-light over-ear headphones pack a punch with their Integrated Processor V1 for effective ANC and a balanced sound signature that includes a surprisingly rich bass. Ideal for long journeys or office use, they offer a massive 35 hours of battery life, ensuring you can enjoy your favorite tunes or podcasts without interruption.

Want something with a bit more flair? The Sony WI-1000XM2 neckband-style earphones at $229 deliver premium ANC in a secure fit that's perfect for professionals on the go. Need a compact option? Bose QC20 wired earphones at $249 offer legendary noise cancellation with the flexibility of Aware Mode for when you want to hear your surroundings. Looking for something ultra-portable? The Sennheiser PXC 550-II at $249 folds flat and adapts to your environment for optimal sound isolation. Or, if you're on a budget, the Sennheiser HD 450BT at $149 provides great sound and effective ANC without breaking the bank.
